curation_notes: The patch modifies a single source file (src/gateway/server/ws-connection/message-handler.ts) plus two test files and CHANGELOG.md. The vulnerability is in the clearUnboundScopes inner function within attachGatewayWsMessageHandler: the original condition (scopes.length > 0 && !controlUiAuthPolicy.allowBypass && !sharedAuthOk) exempted shared-auth connections from scope stripping. The fix simplifies the condition to always clear scopes (scopes.length > 0) and moves the clearUnboundScopes() call to after the auth decision, guarded by (!device && (!isControlUi || decision.kind !== 'allow')). Locations derived from the patch diff as the advisory does not name specific files or functions.
